DISCOVERY 301, NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED AND MR. CLUETT WAS SEEKING CLARIFICATION REGARDING THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING INCLUDING CLARIFICATION AND RULED AS FOLLOWED: PLAINTIFFS MARGHERITA S. ROSENTHAL AND HOWARD L. ROSENTHAL, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEES OF THE MARGHERITA ROSENTHAL TRUST'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY FROM DEFENDANTS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS - AS TO THE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION GRANT AS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES 12.2, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES 1 TO 4, 11 TO 13, 17, 20, 28, 39, 43, 45 TO 49 AND 54 TO 55. REQUEST FOR PRODUCTIONS 14 AND 16. DENIED AS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES 12.1 AND 12.3 TO 12.7, AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES 40 TO 42. AS TO INDIVIDUALS, GRANT AS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES 4, 7, 10, 13 16 AND 19 AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTIONS 1 TO 16. DENIED AS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES 12.1 TO 12.7, AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES 2, 5, 8, 11, 12, 14, 17 TO 19 AND 22. THE COURT DID NOT AWARD SANCTIONS. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER AND COUNSEL TO COMMUNICATE TO THE MOVING PARTY REGARDING THE CLARIFICATIONS ADDRESSED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED. (301/PJB)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

RULING - NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED AND MR. CLUETT WAS SEEKING CLARIFICATION REGARDING THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING INCLUDING CLARIFICATION AND RULED AS FOLLOWED: PLAINTIFFS MARGHERITA S. ROSENTHAL AND HOWARD L. Special Interrogatories 1 to 4, 11 to 13, 17, 20, 28, 39, 43, 45 to 49 and 54 to 55.

Denied as to Form Interrogatories 12.1 to 12.7, and Special Interrogatories 2, 5, 8, 11, 12, 14, 17 to 19 and 22. The court did not award sanctions.
